architecture_summary: Add a schema-backed, witness-only WorldSubstrateReplayWitness that records world snapshot digest refs, replay trace digest refs, sparse-cache truth refs, legal geometry refs, field derivation refs, invariant registry refs, branch quarantine refs, replay probe refs, planner/executor parity refs, safety guards, receipt refs, and authority-denial flags before any world substrate replay evidence can become governance proof.
data_model_changes: Introduce WorldSubstrateReplayWitness with replay_scope, replay_artifacts, invariant_controls, planner_executor_parity, authority_boundary, safety_guards, receipt_refs, contract_summary, and evidence_refs

Represent world snapshots, replay traces, sparse-cache state, invariant registries, legal geometry, branch quarantine, planner traces, executor traces, and parity results through digest refs instead of raw world or replay payloads

Bind explicit no-live-world-service-call, no-SQLite-read, no-SQLite-write, no-world-mutation, no-replay-execution, no-planner-execution, no-executor-execution, no-branch-unquarantine, no-external-endpoint, no-secret, no-write, no-raw-retention, no-terminal-closure flags
rollback_plan: Revert the added schema, example, validator, tests, docs, manifest entry, proof matrix entry, generated fixture updates, and CI hook; rerun protocol, proof coverage, SDLC, and workspace governance checks.
migration_plan: No runtime migration. This is an additive public contract and Foundation Mode example.
